title: notifications-in-app — field classification
description: Zero owned persistent columns. The broadcast payloads carry transient copies of fields from core's Notification model — those fields' classifications are declared in core's data-classes.json. This file exists for uniform module shape + to document the ephemeral socket-borne data.

confidential: note: subject may contain PII (e.g. 'Welcome, Jane Smith'). Broadcast channels are private (authorised per user_id) so PII exposure is limited to the addressed user's connected clients.

notes: Broadcast payloads are ephemeral — they exist only in transit + optionally in a short-lived Reverb queue.
Full notification content (payload, body_rendered_html) is NOT sent over broadcast — the client fetches on-demand from the inbox API. Only the summary fields above are broadcast.
